title: Traditional Algerian Stew (Tagine)
description: A hearty North African-inspired stew made with tender meat and a rich blend of spices, slow-cooked to perfection in a flavorful tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat the tagine sauce in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the nutty and white to the saucepan, stirring to combine.
Bring to a gentle simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the beans to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
